executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The backend runs on http://localhost:8000. No authentication required. IMPORTANT for TC009 path traversal test: HTTP clients normalize raw '../' before sending, so you MUST use URL-encoded traversal. Build the URL like this: url = f'{base_url}/api/export/active-recall-study-system/..%2F..%2F..%2Fetc%2Fpasswd' (use %2F not /). The server returns 400 with {detail: 'Invalid path'} for URL-encoded traversal. For TC005, /api/skills returns files as list of dicts with keys 'relative_path' (string) and 'content' (string). For TC006, use existing skill 'active-recall-study-system'. For TC008, download SKILL.md from 'active-recall-study-system'. For TC010, copy SKILL.md content from 'active-recall-study-system'. Health endpoint returns service name 'Creator Skill Backend'.
